payload.command: gemini mcp disable mcp-neo4j-cypher && gemini mcp enable mcp-neo4j-cypher
gemini mcp disable mcp-neo4j-cypher; gemini mcp enable mcp-neo4j-cypher
gemini mcp add mcp-neo4j-cypher uvx mcp-neo4j-cypher -e NEO4J_URI=neo4j+s://5953bf18.databases.neo4j.io -e NEO4J_USER=neo4j -e NEO4J_PASSWORD=gOxIA3KzrcfH2IEH_-E6IpINrfMKWJmKffHGisw7X5g
gemini mcp add mcp-neo4j-memory uvx mcp-neo4j-memory -e NEO4J_URI=neo4j+s://5953bf18.databases.neo4j.io -e NEO4J_USER=neo4j -e NEO4J_PASSWORD=gOxIA3KzrcfH2IEH_-E6IpINrfMKWJmKffHGisw7X5g

gemini mcp remove mcp-neo4j-cypher; gemini mcp remove mcp-neo4j-memory; gemini mcp add mcp-neo4j-cypher uvx mcp-neo4j-cypher --db-url neo4j+s://5953bf18.databases.neo4j.io --username neo4j --password gOxIA3KzrcfH2IEH_-E6IpINrfMKWJmKffHGisw7X5g; gemini mcp add mcp-neo4j-memory uvx mcp-neo4j-memory --db-url neo4j+s://5953bf18.databases.neo4j.io --username neo4j --password gOxIA3KzrcfH2IEH_-E6IpINrfMKWJmKffHGisw7X5g
